$description: Lumina AI Visibility Platform — Component Manifest (Atomic Design)

categories.name: Atoms
categories.description: Low-level UI primitives based on shadcn/ui with CVA variants. No domain knowledge, no API calls, no feature imports. May import from lib/.

components.name: Button
components.notes: Primary action button. Sizes via separate CVA dimension: default, sm, lg, icon.

components.name: Input
components.notes: Text input field. inputSize variants: sm, default, lg.

components.name: Checkbox
components.notes: Checkbox input. checkboxSize variants: sm, default, lg.

components.name: Badge
components.notes: Small label badge for status, categories, and counts.

components.name: Tooltip
components.notes: Hover tooltip for additional context on elements.

components.name: Card
components.notes: Container card with variant-based styling.

components.name: Separator
components.notes: Visual separator line. Orientation managed via CVA.

components.name: Skeleton
components.notes: Loading placeholder that mimics content shape while data loads.

components.name: Progress
components.notes: Progress bar with semantic color variants. progressSize variants: sm, default, lg.

components.name: Alert
components.notes: Inline alert banner for contextual messages and warnings.

components.name: ScrollArea
components.notes: Custom scrollable container with styled scrollbar.

components.name: Label
components.notes: Form label element. labelSize variants: sm, default, lg.

components.name: Textarea
components.notes: Multi-line text input with default and error states.

components.name: Select
components.notes: Custom styled dropdown select built on Radix UI Select. Supports icons per item, placeholder, size variants, and check indicator. Linear-inspired design.

components.name: RadioGroup
components.notes: Radio button group for single-selection options.

components.name: Switch
components.notes: Toggle switch for boolean settings.

components.name: Avatar
components.notes: User avatar with image or initials fallback in multiple sizes.

components.name: Popover
components.notes: Floating popover container for menus, tooltips, and selects.

components.name: Dialog
components.notes: Modal dialog for focused user interactions.

components.name: Sheet
components.notes: Slide-over drawer panel anchored to a screen edge.

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.notes: Contextual dropdown menu triggered by a button or icon.

components.name: Command
components.notes: Command palette and searchable list for quick actions and search.

components.name: Tabs
components.notes: Tab navigation for switching between content panels.

components.name: Accordion
components.notes: Collapsible accordion sections for progressive disclosure.

components.name: AlertDialog
components.notes: Confirmation dialog requiring explicit user acknowledgement.

components.name: Toast
components.notes: Ephemeral notification toast that appears and auto-dismisses.

components.name: SidebarNavItem
components.notes: Individual nav item with icon, label, and active state.

components.name: InlineEdit
components.notes: Click-to-edit text field. Displays as styled text, transforms to Input on click. Commits on Enter/blur, cancels on Escape.

components.name: BreadcrumbNav
components.notes: Breadcrumb navigation component.

categories.name: Molecules
categories.description: Composed components built from 2+ atoms. No domain knowledge, no API calls, no feature imports. May import from atoms/ and lib/.

components.name: PageHeader
components.notes: Page title, breadcrumbs, and optional actions.

components.name: LoadingPage
components.notes: Full-page loading state with skeleton layout.

components.name: ErrorPage
components.notes: Full-page error state with message and retry action.

components.name: PageContent
components.notes: Content wrapper with max-width and padding.

components.name: EmptyStatePanel
components.notes: Contextual empty state panel with guidance and next steps.

components.name: PartialResultsWarning
components.notes: Warning banner displayed when data is incomplete or partial.

components.name: PageNotFound
components.notes: 404 page not found screen.

components.name: Stepper
components.notes: Reusable wizard stepper with horizontal steps (per-step icons or numbers), connecting lines, checkmarks for completed steps, and Back/Next navigation.

components.name: SectionHeader
components.notes: Linear-style section header: optional leading icon chip, tight-tracked title + muted description, and right-aligned meta/actions slots.

categories.name: Organisms
categories.description: Complex, often stateful sections. May compose atoms and molecules. May use shared hooks for navigation/layout state. No feature imports.

components.name: AppShell
components.notes: Main application shell with sidebar + topbar + content area.

components.name: Sidebar
components.notes: Collapsible sidebar navigation (240px expanded, 48px collapsed).

components.name: ErrorBoundary
components.notes: React error boundary with fallback UI and retry action.

components.name: TopBar
components.notes: Top bar with workspace switcher, search, and user menu.

categories.name: Data Display
categories.description: Components for presenting data, metrics, statuses, and loading states in structured visual formats.

components.name: DataTable
components.notes: Generic data table with sorting, filtering, and pagination.

components.name: MetricCard
components.notes: Single metric display with label, value, and trend indicator.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.notes: Status indicator with color-coded dot mapped to status tokens.

components.name: SeverityBadge
components.notes: Severity level indicator mapped to severity design tokens.

components.name: PriorityBadge
components.notes: Priority level indicator with semantic color coding.

components.name: ConfidenceIndicator
components.notes: Confidence percentage display with visual progress bar.

components.name: EmptyState
components.notes: Empty state placeholder with icon, title, description, and CTA.

components.name: LoadingSkeleton
components.notes: Page-level skeleton layout for loading states.

categories.name: Charts
categories.description: Chart wrapper components built on top of Nivo for consistent data visualization styling and theming.

components.name: BarChartWrapper
components.notes: Nivo bar chart wrapper with Lumina theming applied.

components.name: PieChartWrapper
components.notes: Nivo pie chart wrapper with Lumina theming applied.

components.name: LineChartWrapper
components.notes: Nivo line chart wrapper with Lumina theming applied.

components.name: StackedBarWrapper
components.notes: Nivo stacked bar chart wrapper with Lumina theming applied.

components.name: SentimentDonut
components.notes: Sentiment distribution donut chart for positive/neutral/negative breakdown.

categories.name: Feature — Discovery
categories.description: Components for the website discovery and crawl flow, including AI-suggested pages, topics, and manual fallback entry.

components.name: DiscoveryConfirmationScreen
components.notes: 5-step discovery confirmation wizard. Orchestrates wizard state, re-suggestion API call at step 3→4 transition, and final confirmation.

components.name: DiscoverySection
components.notes: Collapsible section within the discovery confirmation screen. Supports per-lens refresh with onRefresh/refreshesRemaining/isRefreshing props.

components.name: SuggestionCard
components.notes: Individual crawl suggestion card for a page or topic.

components.name: ConfidenceTag
components.notes: AI confidence level tag with color-coded severity.

components.name: ManualFallbackPrompt
components.notes: Manual entry prompt shown when crawl yields low results.

components.name: CrawlProgressIndicator
components.notes: Real-time crawl progress indicator with live updates via SignalR.

components.name: DiscoveryProgressScreen
components.notes: Discovery progress screen shown during crawl execution.

components.name: DiscoveryStepProgress
components.notes: Step-by-step progress indicator for the discovery workflow.

components.name: AddCustomItemForm
components.notes: Form for manually adding custom items with optional type dropdown (Select with icons).

components.name: WizardStepBrandIdentity
components.notes: Wizard step 1: brand profile card with inline-editable industry, category, and positioning fields.

components.name: WizardStepProducts
components.notes: Wizard step 2: single DiscoverySection for products with select/deselect/add-custom controls.

components.name: WizardStepAudiencesMarkets
components.notes: Wizard step 3: two DiscoverySection instances for audiences and markets.

components.name: WizardStepCompetitiveLandscape
components.notes: Wizard step 4: three DiscoverySection instances for topics, competitors, and trust signals. Shows loading overlay during re-suggestion.

components.name: WizardStepReview
components.notes: Wizard step 5: interactive review of all selections with removable/editable chips, inline add, undo toast, and edit-section deep links.

categories.name: Feature — Brands
categories.description: Components for brand management including creation, editing, and brand-level configuration.

components.name: AddBrandForm
components.notes: Form for adding a new brand with name and website URL.

components.name: BrandList
components.notes: Brand picker: lists onboarded brands with discovery status, links to each brand's discovery/tracker flow, and an Add Brand action.

categories.name: Feature — Tracker
categories.description: Components for creating, editing, and managing visibility trackers including prompt configuration and platform selection.

components.name: TrackerNameEditor
components.notes: Inline editable tracker name field.

components.name: PromptCard
components.notes: Individual prompt display card with metadata and actions.

components.name: PromptReviewScreen
components.notes: Prompt review: collapsible per-Visibility-Check cards (auto-generates on first load), allocation bar, add-custom form, regenerate all, and confirm. Shown after tracker creation.

components.name: PromptCheckGroup
components.notes: Collapsible card for one Visibility Check: lists its prompts with AI/human source icon, inline-editable text, per-prompt remove, and a per-check regenerate.

components.name: PlatformSelector
components.notes: Multi-select control for choosing target AI platforms.

components.name: CadenceSelector
components.notes: Scan frequency selector for scheduling tracker runs.

components.name: PromptRegenerateMenu
components.notes: Dropdown menu with AI prompt regeneration options.

components.name: TrackerStatusBadge
components.notes: Tracker lifecycle status indicator badge.

components.name: ReadyToCreateTrackerScreen
components.notes: Ready-to-create screen: editable suggested tracker name + coverage summary from the setup-preview endpoint; calls POST /brands/{id}/trackers.

categories.name: Feature — Scan
categories.description: Components for scan execution, real-time progress monitoring, and scan result summaries.

components.name: ScanProgressScreen
components.notes: Real-time scan execution progress screen with live updates.

components.name: ScanCheckCounter
components.notes: Animated counter displaying completed scan checks.

components.name: PlatformStatusCard
components.notes: Per-platform scan status card showing progress and state.

components.name: RotatingProgressMessage
components.notes: Rotating motivational status messages displayed during scan execution.

components.name: ScanSummaryHeader
components.notes: Post-scan summary statistics bar with key metrics.

components.name: ScanStatusBanner
components.notes: Contextual banner showing current scan status.

categories.name: Feature — Findings & Actions
categories.description: Components for displaying AI visibility findings, evidence summaries, and recommended content actions.

components.name: FindingCard
components.notes: Individual finding summary card with severity and confidence.

components.name: ContentActionCard
components.notes: Content action recommendation card with actionable steps.

components.name: FindingDetailDrawer
components.notes: Full finding details displayed in a right-side drawer.

components.name: ContentActionDetailDrawer
components.notes: Full content action details displayed in a drawer.

components.name: EvidenceSummaryBlock
components.notes: AI evidence summary block with source citations.

categories.name: Feature — Reporting
categories.description: Components for tracker dashboards, performance tables, evidence views, and scan run history.

components.name: CoreMetricsRow
components.notes: Horizontal row of core visibility metric cards.

components.name: PromptEvidenceTable
components.notes: Table of prompts with corresponding AI answers and confidence.

components.name: FullAnswerDrawer
components.notes: Drawer displaying the full AI-generated answer text.

components.name: TopicPerformanceRow
components.notes: Topic-level performance display with metrics per topic.

components.name: CompetitorPerformanceRow
components.notes: Competitor comparison display showing relative performance.

components.name: SourceCitationRow
components.notes: Source and citation tracking display table.

components.name: TrackerDashboard
components.notes: Main tracker dashboard view with metrics, charts, and tabbed content.

components.name: RecentScanRunsTable
components.notes: Table of recent scan runs with status and summary data.
